code:
import io
import string

fn abs_int(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut best_val = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut have = false

  mut in_tok = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        let val = sign * cur
        let av = abs_int(val)
        if not have
          best_val = val
          best_abs = av
          have = true
        else if av < best_abs
          best_val = val
          best_abs = av
        end
        in_tok = false
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        in_tok = true
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
        else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          cur = b - 48
        end
      else
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        end
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
end
